_instructions: To add a new post: copy one of the post blocks below, paste it at the top of the 'posts' array, fill in the details, and create the matching HTML file in the /blog/ folder. The 'slug' must match the filename exactly (e.g. slug 'my-post' = /blog/my-post.html). Leave 'image' empty to show no image.

posts.title: Microblading or Nano Brows: Which Suits You?
posts.excerpt: Two distinct techniques. One shared goal: brows that look effortlessly real. Understanding the difference helps you choose what is right for your skin, your lifestyle, and the result you are after.
